title: OpenTrust Error Response
description: Standard error envelope for all OpenTrust registry API responses. Every non-2xx response from a conforming registry must use this format. Standardizing error codes lets agent implementations handle failures consistently regardless of which registry they are speaking to.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code. Agents use this to decide how to handle failures — e.g., RATE_LIMITED → retry with backoff, TRUST_TOO_LOW → skip this tool, PASSPORT_REVOKED → alert operator.

message.description: Human-readable description of the error. Not intended for machine parsing.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this request. Include in bug reports and support requests.

details.description: Optional structured context. Contents vary by error_code.

slug.description: The tool slug involved, if applicable.

field.description: For VALIDATION_ERROR: the field that failed validation.

constraint.description: For VALIDATION_ERROR: the constraint that was violated.

retry_after_seconds.description: For RATE_LIMITED: seconds to wait before retrying.

required_trust_status.description: For TRUST_TOO_LOW: the minimum trust_status required.

actual_trust_status.description: For TRUST_TOO_LOW: the tool's current trust_status.

alternatives.description: For SLUG_AMBIGUOUS: list of fully-qualified slugs the ambiguous slug could resolve to.

successor_slug.description: For PASSPORT_REVOKED or sunset tools: the recommended replacement slug.

schema_version_supported.description: For SCHEMA_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED: list of spec versions this registry accepts.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred.

$comment: HTTP status code mapping: PASSPORT_NOT_FOUND=404, PASSPORT_REVOKED=410, TRUST_TOO_LOW=403, SIGNATURE_INVALID=401, SIGNATURE_MISSING=401, TOKEN_EXPIRED=401, TOKEN_REVOKED=401, OPERATOR_KEY_REVOKED=401, SPEND_POLICY_MISSING=403, SPEND_POLICY_INVALID=400, SPEND_LIMIT_EXCEEDED=402, PERMISSION_BLOCKED=403, NETWORK_NOT_ALLOWED=403, REGISTRY_NOT_TRUSTED=403, SLUG_AMBIGUOUS=409, SLUG_SQUATTED=409, NONCE_ALREADY_USED=409, PAYMENT_UNVERIFIED=402, PAYMENT_AMOUNT_INSUFFICIENT=402, PAYMENT_NETWORK_MISMATCH=400, PAYMENT_TOKEN_INVALID=400, ESCROW_AUDIT_NOT_VERIFIED=403, DELEGATION_EXPIRED=403, RATE_LIMITED=429, BATCH_TOO_LARGE=400, SCHEMA_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED=400, VALIDATION_ERROR=422, INTERNAL_ERROR=500, SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE=503
